raw.message: The safety of our customers is our top priority. We utilize cutting-edge technology and resources to empower customers to play responsibly. Check out our Responsible Gaming tools!

hook.summary: A group of friends in a living room discuss a football kicker's reliability before a musical transition.
hook.visual_action: A man in a Kansas City Chiefs jersey stands and talks to his friends while holding a phone.
hook.text_overlay: DRAFTKINGS legal disclaimer and responsible gaming text.
hook.voiceover_transcript: He's automatic from the 40. You should never count your money...

scene_flow: Friends in a living room debate a kicker's stats during a game.
A woman begins singing 'The Gambler' as a comedic response to the overconfidence.
The scene shifts to a snowy outdoor tailgate with fans singing and celebrating together.
Responsible gaming messaging appears over a dark background followed by the brand logo reveal.
The ad cuts back to the living room for a final comedic remark telling the friend to stop talking.
on_screen_text: CONCERNED ABOUT YOUR GAMBLING? CALL CONNEXONTARIO 1-866-531-2600.
It's more fun when it's for fun
audience_proxy: Adult sports fans in Ontario who enjoy the social and competitive aspects of sports betting.
